name: Get Direct Mail Performance by Period for an OpCo

content.query:
select 
MONTH(lds.EntryDate) as MonthOfEntryDate
,Zip
,count(distinct LeadID) as LeadCount
,sum(GrossSalesAmount) as GrossSalesAmount
,count(distinct LeadSubSource) as UniqueSubSourceCount
,sum(case when DispositionID like '%Sale%' then 1 else 0 end) as SoldLeads
from
(
SELECT 
lds.LeadID
,lds.EntryDate
,lds.GrossSalesAmount
,lds.DispositionID
,lds.[ApptSet]
,lds.Sold
,srs.LeadSubSource
,cst.Zip
 FROM 
 [EDW].[FACT_LEAD] lds
 ,[EDW].[DIM_CUSTOMER] cst
 ,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
 WHERE
lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and lds.CustomerID = cst.CustomerID
and lds.OperatingCompany = 'FHI'
and 
(
    lds.EntryDate between '2022-01-01' and '2022-01-31'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-02-01' and '2022-02-28'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-03-01' and '2022-03-31'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-04-01' and '2022-04-30'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-05-01' and '2022-05-31'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-06-01' and '2022-06-30'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-07-01' and '2022-07-31'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-08-01' and '2022-08-31'
    or lds.EntryDate between '2022-09-01' and '2022-09-15'
)
and srs.LeadSubSource like '%Direct Mail%'
) lds
group by
MONTH(lds.EntryDate)
,Zip
order by 
MonthOfEntryDate asc


select
min(lds.CustomerID)
,sum(lds.GrossSalesAmount)
from
EDW.FACT_LEAD lds
,EDW.FACT_JOB job
,[EDW].[DIM_LEAD_SUB_SOURCE] srs
 WHERE
lds.LeadSubSourceID = srs.LeadSubSourceID
and lds.LeadID = job.LeadID
and lds.OperatingCompany = 'FHI'
and lds.EntryDate between '2022-09-01' and '2022-09-15'
and job.ContractDate between '2022-09-01' and '2022-09-15'
and lds.DispositionID like '%Sale%'
and srs.LeadSubSource like '%Direct Mail%'


select 
cst.Zip
,count(lds.id) as LeadCount
,sum(lds.gsa) as GSA
from 
[ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
,[ODS].[LP_FHI_cst_Customers] cst
WHERE
lds.cst_id = cst.id
and lds.srs_id in 
(
SELECT [ID]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs]
 --where Descr like 'Direct Mail - October -%'
 where Descr like '%Direct Mail%'
)
and lds.EntryDate between '2022-10-01' and '2022-10-31'
group BY
cst.zip
order by GSA desc



select 
count(lds.id) as LeadCount
,sum(lds.gsa) as GSA
from 
[ODS].[LP_FHI_Lds_Leads] lds
WHERE
lds.srs_id in 
(
SELECT [ID]
 FROM [ODS].[LP_FHI_srs_SourceSubs]
 --where Descr like 'Direct Mail - October -%'
 where Descr like '%Direct Mail%'
)
and lds.EntryDate between '2022-10-01' and '2022-10-31'
